overall.description: A first-person exploration of a foggy industrial harbor dock in a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2), featuring wooden warehouses, moored sailboats in misty water, and industrial smokestacks. The player walks along the wooden planks, observes the harbor, and discovers a body near the J. Cooper & Co warehouse.

events.description: moving under a covered roof structure on the dock
exiting the covered structure back to open dock

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock beside a large industrial warehouse and steamship

notable_agents.action: worker in white clothing walking along the warehouse wall

tall factory smokestacks emitting dark smoke in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a foggy industrial dock, walking alongside a large wooden warehouse and a moored steamship. The camera moves under a temporary covered structure before emerging back into the open, with industrial smokestacks visible through the mist in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock platform approaching harbor edge

events.description: slowing down as approaching the edge of the dock
reaching the harbor edge where wooden dock meets the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the open dock toward the water's edge, observing the harbor surroundings

notable_agents.action: worker in blue overalls standing at a workbench near the dock edge

entered.detail: stacked wooden shipping crates and boxes on the dock
wooden mooring posts for securing boats

segments.scene_description: Moving along the open dock toward the harbor edge, passing wooden cargo crates and mooring bollards. The warehouse recedes into the background as the camera approaches the water, where a worker stands near a workbench.

events.description: camera looks down over the dock edge at the water and boats below
panning across the harbor to reveal the industrial skyline with smokestacks

agents.ego_description: looking down at the boats in the foggy harbor and panning across the water to observe the industrial backdrop

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the dock edge facing the water

entered.detail: multiple wooden sailboats with masts moored in the foggy water
calm water surface with reflections of boats and fog

segments.scene_description: At the harbor edge, the camera looks down at sailboats moored in the misty water, then pans left across the harbor revealing the industrial smokestacks silhouetted against the golden sky. A lone figure sits on the dock edge facing the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock walkway with J. Cooper warehouse

events.description: passing the J. Cooper & Co warehouse building with visible signage
discovering a body lying on the wooden dock planks

agents.ego_description: walking along the dock past workers and discovering a body on the wooden planks near the warehouse

notable_agents.action: worker in vest and hat leaning against the warehouse wall smoking
dead body lying face down on the dock planks

entered.detail: green wooden warehouse with yellow J. COOPER & CO signage and large sliding doors
stacked wooden barrels and crates near the building
large steamship with red and white smokestack docked alongside

segments.scene_description: Returning to the dock level, the camera walks past the J. Cooper & Co warehouse, wooden barrels, and docked cargo ships. Workers stand around the area, and the segment ends with the discovery of a body lying on the wooden planks near the warehouse wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial harbor that shifts from a claustrophobic warehouse corridor to an expansive waterfront view before ending in a grim discovery. It begins by walking alongside a large wooden warehouse and a moored steamship, passing under a temporary covered structure while industrial smokestacks loom through the mist. As the camera moves toward the harbor edge, the warehouse recedes and the view opens up to reveal cargo crates and a worker at a workbench. The scene then expands across the misty water where sailboats are moored, panning left to show the smokestacks silhouetted against a golden sky and a lone figure sitting by the water. Finally, the camera returns to the dock level to pass the J. Cooper & Co warehouse and docked cargo ships, moving past scattered barrels and workers before coming to a halt at a body lying on the wooden planks.
